claim_boundary: Sequence/developability QC and VHH monomer structure predictions only; not PVRIG binding, affinity, docking, competition, or experimental blocking evidence.

igfold_policy.completed_pdbs: validate and byte-freeze when ID, sequence FASTA, command exit, and CA coverage pass
igfold_policy.missing_pdbs: run direct IgFold prediction with one model on GPUs 0-3, then apply the same validation

nfs_policy: The frozen old NFS process identity guard must pass before reruns, before publication, and immediately before terminal receipts. No SIGCONT and no NFS sync-back are allowed.
publication_policy: Fail unless all seven null payloads become non-null schema-valid TNP results; capture each payload once, publish an immutable content-addressed delivery, link the publication receipt last, then create canonical recovery and path-switch receipts with O_EXCL.
